title: Black Friday Crunch 🛒
description: The CEO needs emergency sales metrics. Join tables and aggregate data fast!
story: It's Black Friday, the biggest shopping day of the year. The servers are under heavy load. The CEO bursts into your cubicle. 'I need to know exactly how much revenue each store location generated today, right now!' It's time to shine.

tasks.title: Calculate Total Revenue per Store
tasks.description: Join the `stores` table with the `sales` table. Calculate the total revenue (sum of amount) for each store. Return the store `location` and the total revenue aliased as `total_revenue`.
tasks.instruction: Select `location` from `stores` and `SUM(amount)` as `total_revenue` from `sales`. Join them on `store_id`. Group the results by `location`.
